name: Squash and Apple Bake
recipeIngredient: Baking apples (2, peeled, cored and cut into ½-inch slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each squash in half and remove seeds and fibers. Pare the squash.
2. Cut the squash into ½-inch slices.
3. In a bowl, stir together brown sugar, butter, flour, salt, and mace until well combined.
4. Arrange the squash slices in an ungreased 11-1/2 x 7-1/2 x 1-1/2 inch baking dish.
5. Top the squash with apple slices.
6. Sprinkle the sugar mixture over the top of the squash and apples.
7. Cover the dish with foil.
8. Bake in a 350 degree F oven for 50 to 60 minutes, or until the squash is tender.
Serves 6.
